text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That race was so fun!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The energy of the crowd! Everyone racing at full
speed!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just that is enough to make me happy, but seeing
my name on the scoreboard is like... whoa!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I just know if I'd been in first place, I'd be even
happier right now!
choice_data_list: For now, let's just be happy! You've earned it!
Then let's make first place happen next time!
Then let's make first place happen next time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I just know if I'd been in first place, I'd be even
happier right now!
choice_data_list: For now, let's just be happy! You've earned it!
Then let's make first place happen next time!
Then let's make first place happen next time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! Then I'll just be happy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! I got a great result!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, then I gotta go louder!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I were to get first in a fun race like the
one we just had...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It'd make me happier than anything—I know it
would!
choice_data_list: We'll work hard for it until it's yours!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll train lots and lots and go even harder than I
did today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Then next time... I'll get that first place! Wooo!
